calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields #7235.

Brian Doucette, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Salesforce.com
Plaintiff's Witness: Betty Levison was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Shyft Media as follows:

Damages/Principal - $155,487.50
Attorney Fees - $6,750.00
Pre-judgment Interest - $42,572.05
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $205,284.55

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Continued To Oct-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
